title: Dunzo Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dunzo Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo Capital India family as a Full Stack Developer in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
